title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Apollo Telehealth! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!
